framework.name: PayPal positioning as AP2 open standard supporter
framework.description: PayPal explicitly supporting Google-proposed AP2 as an 'open, interoperable extension' to existing protocols (Agent2Agent, Model Context Protocol). Commits to integrating across global infrastructure (~200 markets) rather than building proprietary alternative. Leading commerce extension effort with 'participating companies.'
framework.raw_quote: PayPal announced its support for the Agent Payments Protocol (AP2), an open, interoperable extension to Agent2Agent (A2A) protocol and the Model Context Protocol (MCP)... PayPal is leading an effort with participating companies to extend AP2 with a standard developed for commerce use cases

source.title: Agent Payments Protocol: Building Verifiable Trust for Agentic ...
